featuresSection.label: Features
featuresSection.title: With Us, Fuel is Under Your Control
featuresSection.description: A complete set of tools for efficient control of fuel expenses in your organization

items.title: DRIVERS WILL NOT OVERSPEND
items.description: set a limit on the card and monitor expenses in real time

items.title: EXPENSE CONTROL
items.description: detailed statistics and reports on all operations

items.title: SIMPLICITY AND TRANSPARENCY
items.description: get a card and use the service without hidden fees and commissions

items.title: 24/7 SUPPORT
items.description: round-the-clock support service - help at any time

items.title: QUICK START
items.description: get a card on the website and start refueling right now

items.title: VIRTUAL OR PHYSICAL CARD AT YOUR CHOICE

headline.line2: refuel with discounts at over 20,000 gas stations in Russia and Kazakhstan

hero.subtitle: Our partners: Tatneft, Lukoil, Rosneft, Gazpromneft, Bashneft, TNK and others.

aboutUsSection.label: About Us
aboutUsSection.title: Why Choose Us
aboutUsSection.intro: Our card provides access to over 20,000 gas stations covering all key routes in Russia and Kazakhstan, while offering stable and fixed fuel discounts.

systemSection.title: In addition to savings, we provide a comprehensive accounting and control system:
benefits: Detailed analytics, expense control and spending limits for each vehicle
Access to all data in one application

aboutUsSection.conclusion: We provide a personalized approach to each client, finding solutions tailored to the needs of both large businesses and entrepreneurs of any scale
